_meta.explanation: Output is 'True'. Rule: When using cross_val_score with a Pipeline containing StandardScaler, the scaler's mean_ is refit on each training fold, so its value differs across folds rather than being a single constant fitted on all data.
_meta.curriculum_note: Direct behavioral prediction: When using cross_val_score with a Pipeline containing StandardScaler, the scaler's mean_ is refit on each training fold, so its value differs across folds rather than being a single constant fitted on all data.
